mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warning_record (medicine_id, batch_no, warning_type, warning_level, warning_message, status, created_at) SELECT m.id, NULL, 'LOW_STOCK', 'WARN', CONCAT(m.medicine_name, ' total stock is below safe stock'), 'OPEN', NOW() FROM medicine m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT medicine_id, SUM(current_quantity) AS total_quantity FROM inventory WHERE expiry_date >= CURDATE() GROUP BY medicine_id ) s ON s.medicine_id = m.id WHERE m.status = 1 AND IFNULL(s.total_quantity, 0) <= m.safe_stock

INSERT INTO warning_record (medicine_id, batch_no, warning_type, warning_level, warning_message, status, created_at) SELECT m.id, i.batch_no, 'EXPIRED', 'CRITICAL', CONCAT(m.medicine_name, ' batch ', i.batch_no, ' is expired'), 'OPEN', NOW() FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicine m ON m.id = i.medicine_id WHERE i.current_quantity > 0 AND i.expiry_date < CURDATE()

INSERT INTO warning_record (medicine_id, batch_no, warning_type, warning_level, warning_message, status, created_at) SELECT m.id, i.batch_no, 'EXPIRY_SOON', 'WARN', CONCAT(m.medicine_name, ' batch ', i.batch_no, ' will expire soon'), 'OPEN', NOW() FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicine m ON m.id = i.medicine_id WHERE i.current_quantity > 0 AND i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() AND DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= m.expiry_warning_days
mapper.select: SELECT wr.id, wr.medicine_id, m.medicine_code, m.medicine_name, wr.batch_no, wr.warning_type, wr.warning_level, wr.warning_message, wr.status, wr.created_at, wr.handled_at FROM warning_record wr INNER JOIN medicine m ON wr.medicine_id = m.id WHERE wr.status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY wr.created_at DESC, wr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'OPEN' THEN 1 END) AS open_total, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'OPEN' AND warning_type = 'LOW_STOCK' THEN 1 END) AS low_stock_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'OPEN' AND warning_type = 'EXPIRY_SOON' THEN 1 END) AS expiry_soon_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'OPEN' AND warning_type = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 END) AS expired_count FROM warning_record
